finding: Requires command envelope, idempotency, outbox, RFC 9457 problem details, OpenAPI route, simulations, and no Generic CRUD mutation authority.
repair_decision: Implement shared gateway and fail-closed route; do not claim domain handlers complete.

finding: Repo policy requires POST /api/v1/commands/{CommandName}, Idempotency-Key, X-Correlation-Id, CSRF, transaction, audit/evidence, outbox, deterministic replay, and conflict handling.
repair_decision: Reused existing idempotency service and added command audit/outbox link schema.

finding: Replay ledger already supports PostgreSQL/cache/file backends, fingerprint conflict, and in-progress conflict detection.
repair_decision: No parallel idempotency implementation; DomainCommandGatewayService delegates to it.

finding: domain_outbox_events already exists, but generic command-to-outbox linkage was absent.
repair_decision: Added domain_command_outbox_link and gateway pending_retry behavior.

finding: OpenAPI and selected controllers already use RFC 9457 ProblemDetail, but command route was absent.
repair_decision: Added command path and reused ProblemDetail response model.

finding: REST route params are stored in $_GET and session/CSRF middleware wraps state-changing routes.
P26/P29/P30 deny governed roots from generic mutation, but command replacement was not present.
repair_decision: P31 adds envelope route, but domain-specific command handlers remain P32/P33/P34/P36 work.

finding: Current environment still reports JSON_ONLY / PostgreSQL not reachable.
repair_decision: Do not claim PostgreSQL command audit live writes until cutover/live DB proof.
